use_cases: Display a loading state while waiting for AI-generated content to complete
Show visual feedback during LLM response generation
Keep users informed during AI processing workflows
Provide a branded loading experience for AI-powered applications
Indicate progress during chatbot or AI assistant interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist AI loading indicator that displays the word 'Generating...' with animated letters and a loader element. This component provides visual feedback during AI content generation processes, keeping users informed while waiting for LLM responses. It serves as a lightweight, atomic feedback component suitable for SaaS AI tools, developer platforms, and creative AI applications.
